name: pulse-whatsapp-backend
description: Local Node.js backend for the Pulse WhatsApp Operations dashboard. Exposes a REST API on http://localhost:3001 backed by whatsapp-web.js, with SQLite persistence and one-shot/recurring scheduled sending.

scripts.reset:session: rm -rf .wwebjs_auth .wwebjs_cache && echo 'Session reset — next start will require a new QR scan.'
scripts.reset:all: npm run reset:session && npm run reset:db && rm -rf uploads
